sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n39058" key="e)pi/gnafos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπίγνᾰφος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n39058.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cleaned</tr_>, of clothes, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:7:77" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.77</biblScope> </bibl>; cf. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δευτερουργός</foreign> II.</sense> </entryFree>
